posts.title_zh: Newsletter 摘要｜近期已实现收益（截至 2026-04-10）
posts.title_en: Newsletter Digest | Recent Realized Returns (as of 2026-04-10)
posts.summary_zh: ORKA、ERAS 等近期平仓亮点与 PSQ 亏损样本并列；16 笔已平仓、胜率 50%、单笔均值约 +1.42%；与 Walk-Forward 长期口径的关系说明。
posts.summary_en: Cutoff-bounded realized highlights (ORKA, ERAS, ELVN, CRC) plus PSQ as the loss side; 16 closes, 50% win rate, ~+1.42% simple mean per trade; how this maps to long-horizon validation.

posts.title_zh: 熊市防御策略：为什么我们持有做空ETF
posts.title_en: Bear Market Defense: Why We Hold Inverse ETFs
posts.summary_zh: 当VIX突破25、主要指数跌破200日均线，量化模型会自动切换到防御模式。本文解析信号逻辑与持仓逻辑。
posts.summary_en: When VIX spikes above 25 and major indices break below their 200-day MA, our quant model auto-shifts defensive. Here's the signal logic.

posts.title_zh: 动量因子IC验证报告：Walk-Forward结果解读
posts.title_en: Momentum Factor IC Validation: Walk-Forward Results Explained
posts.summary_zh: 通过40个Walk-Forward窗口验证因子有效性，平均IC=0.043，稳定性远超随机基准。
posts.summary_en: 40-window walk-forward validation of our momentum factors. Average IC=0.043, far exceeding random baseline.
